name: Cooked Apple Pie Filling
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Apples, peeled and core sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients.
2. Cook over low heat until apples are semi-soft and the mixture is thick.
3. Refrigerate overnight.
4. Use a 9-inch pan with 2-crust pie dough.
5. Bake at 450°F for 30 minutes.
6. Allow pie to cool completely before slicing.
7. Do not refrigerate finished pie. The flavor of this filling permeates the crust when left at room temperature.
